title: Puckator Eden Grey Ceramic Heart Shaped Double Dish Oil & Wax Melt Burner - Wax Melt Burners Warmer - Boho Bedroom Decor Diffuser Scent Tea Light Burner Holder - House Warming Gift - Aromatherapy Set
features: 🔥 Works With Tea Light Candles To Gently Heat Fragrance
🌿 Great For Aromatherapy, Relaxation, And Stress Relief
🧼 Easy To Clean Ceramic After Use
🧘 Ideal For Yoga Studios Or Spa Rooms Needing Zen Atmosphere
description: From the manufacturer Puckator is an international wholesale distributor of gifts that supplies original and quality items throughout Europe, the UK and beyond. They have more than 30 years of experience and are one of the most important players in the wholesale sector of gift items. Initially, the company started by importing handicrafts from around the world; specializing in products from Indonesia and distributing them to independent gift shops across the UK. You can find a wide catalog of gift items, children's toys, stationery, home accessories and much more! Shop original and unique wholesale gifts and gifts designed by your own creative team. CATEGORIES Collections Original and unique wholesale gift items. At Puckator you have a wide range of wholesale collections, a wide variety of brands that include themes and ranges that adapt to all kinds of tastes to become a hit on your shelves. They constantly update their catalog with new products and fashion designs, to the point that many times it is their own gift items that set trend. Here you will find designs as recognizable as Mr Bean, Simon's Cat or Aardman's Shaun the Sheep among many others. Aromatherapy Wholesalers aromatherapy with an extensive catalog of Incenses, Essential Oils, Candles, Incense Burners, Reflux Burners and all kinds of items related to aromatherapy wholesale. Puckator as an aromatherapy wholesaler offers you the best to disconnect from the reality around you and connect with yourself. Whether creating a relaxed atmosphere with its wholesale aromatic candles, wrapping yourself in natural scents with their censers or enjoying a relaxing bath at the end of the day with their wholesale bath bombs. As aromatherapy wholesalers, they have the product that suits your needs and the tastes of their customers! Toys and Stationery A whole selection of wholesale stationery and toys to choose from with original designs and a wide variety of themes to inspire and delight children of all ages. At Puckator, as a wholesaler of gift items, they care about always offering you the best products. The category of stationery and toys satisfies all kinds of tastes and fits perfectly into different retail environments. The most adorable back-to-school backpacks, the most original pens for college or office, the funniest kiosk toys, and many more surprises they have prepared for you! Home and Garden Wholesale home and garden decor items in Puckator. Find elegant, extravagant and unique decor items for the home or for gardens and terraces here. They have everything you need to give an original and special touch to your home! Discover a huge collection of products and designs to choose from, with styles that suit all kinds of customers. His design team works tirelessly to keep your home and garden items always follow the latest trends, creating exclusive designs that set trend. Fashion and Beauty Original and fun wholesale beauty and fashion accessories. Discover everything they have prepared at Puckator for you: lip glosses, manicure sets, nail files, makeup kits, hair clips, small emergency kits, makeup sponges and more! All of these beauty accessories are available in a variety of designs that follow the latest trends, so that they catch your clients. Gothic and Fantasy Wholesale Gothic, fantasy and cultural items are a year-round bestseller and never go out of style. Cinema, television and literature continue to feed the fantasy world with new ideas and characters, so it's easy to understand why this range is so popular. Collectors and fans of fantasy worlds will not be able to resist their fairy figures, angel and cherubim items, the darkest and most original skulls, or dragon ebb burners, among many other surprises! Souvenirs and Gifts Shop souvenirs and collectibles wholesale for tourist stores, museum souvenir shops or gift shops. In this category you will also find gift items and decorations wholesale for celebrations and festivities all year round. Christmas ornaments, Halloween decorations, gifts for weddings or communions... everything you need and more for the most special days!
